ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the taxon */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the taxon (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "phylogenetic_tree_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to the phylogenetic tree structure */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the taxon */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatty_acids" (
  "fatty_acid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatty acid */,
  "fatty_acid_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fatty acid */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the fatty acid (e.g., 16:0) */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the fatty acid */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the fatty acid (e.g., saturated, unsaturated) */,
  "health_implications" TEXT /* Brief information about the health implications of the fatty acid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatty_acid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon being measured */,
  "fatty_acid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fatty acid being measured */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sample */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the fatty acid */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of concentration (e.g., mg/g, %) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of collection */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the measurement */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_fatty_acid_id FOREIGN KEY ("fatty_acid_id") REFERENCES fatty_acids ("fatty_acid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easier search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
column_names: Classification of the taxon (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class)
ID linking to the phylogenetic tree structure
Unique identifier for each fatty acid
Full name of the fatty acid
Chemical formula of the fatty acid
Category of the fatty acid (e.g., saturated, unsaturated)
Brief information about the health implications of the fatty acid
ID of the taxon being measured

Method used to collect the data
ID of the researcher who conducted the measurement
Environmental conditions at the time of measurement
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator)
